---
title: "GaPs Systems Serology — Analysis Pipeline"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: true
---
## Overview

This repository contains the analysis code for:

> **Pertussis immunisation in pregnancy shapes the functional antibody landscape
> before primary infant pertussis vaccination**
> Saso, Zens et al. (in preparation)

The analysis uses longitudinal systems serology from up to 312 mother–infant
dyads in the [Gambian Pertussis Study (GaPs)](https://doi.org/10.1016/s1473-3099(25)00072-6),
a randomised 2×2 maternal–infant vaccine trial.

## Data

Data are not included in this repository. See `data/README.md` for the full
schema and data access information.

## Pipeline

The analysis comprises 8 prespecified components plus a cross-validated
block-ladder summary (CK), matching the manuscript sections exactly.

| Component | Manuscript section | Topic |
|-----------|-------------------|-------|
| [C0](C0_data_harmonisation.html) | Methods | Data harmonisation & IgG standardisation |
| [C1](C1_arm_contrast.html) | Results A | Maternal arm contrast at 8-week baseline |
| [C2](C2_antibody_chain.html) | Results B | Antibody chain: production → transfer → decay |
| [C3](C3_responder_phenotype.html) | Results C | Maternal responder phenotype & predictors |
| [C4a](C4_forward_prediction_PTNA.html) | Results D–E | Forward prediction → PTNA |
| [C4b](C4_forward_prediction_SBA.html) | Results D–E | Forward prediction → SBA |
| [C4c](C4_forward_prediction_WTIgG.html) | Results D–E | Forward prediction → WT IgG binding |
| [C4d](C4_interaction_deming.html) | Results E | Arm interaction & Deming EIV regression | prediction: maternal IgG → infant function |
| [C5](C5_concurrent_models.html) | Results F | Concurrent infant models |
| [C6](C6_responder_in_model.html) | Results J | Responder phenotype as predictor of infant function |
| [C7](C7_effector_pathway.html) | Results H | Effector pathway: IgG1 → FcγR → ADCD → SBA |
| [C8](C8_subclass_balance.html) | Results I | Subclass balance & complement mediation |
| [CK](CK_block_ladder.html) | Results K | Cross-validated block-ladder decomposition |

## Execution order

Components must be run in this order due to data dependencies:
C0 → C1 → C2 → C3 → C4a/C4b/C4c (parallel) → C4d → C5 → C6 → C7 → C8 → CK
